chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No. D – 342 of 2018. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. ------- Mr. Fakhruddin Dahraj, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. along with ASI I.O. Poonjo Mal from Police Station Chachro, District Tharparkar at Mithi. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. Mr. Sobdar Khan Khoso, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.5 & 6; taken on record. Respondent No.4 Bharmal s/o Somji present in person. ---- The alleged detenue Shrimati Pari has been produced by ASI Poonjo Mal of Police Station Chachro, Taluka Chachro, District Tharparkar @ Mithi. Shrimati Pari appears to be aged about 19 years submit that at present she is residing with her parents and she wants to go and live with her parents. Her father namely Bharmal and mother Shrimati Lachmi alias Lachi are present. It is stated by the counsel for the petitioner that Shrimati Pari has contracted marriage with one Wakto which has antagonized her father who has lodged F.I.R. bearing crime No.72 of 2017, under section 365-B, 452, 34 PPC. He further submits that the husband of the alleged abductee is confined in Jail and requests that she may be sent to Darul Aman. We are not convinced with the arguments of learned counsel for the petitioner for the reason that since Shrimati Pari categorically states that she does not want to go anywhere except to the house of her parents who are also present in Court. In view of the above, the purpose of filing this petition has been achieved, therefore, the petition stands disposed of. However, Shrimati Pari is allowed to go with her parents.
In view of the above, the purpose of filing this petition has been achieved, therefore, the petition stands disposed of. However, Shrimati Pari is allowed to go with her parents. JUDGE JUDGE
